info.name: Cosmic-Tech Therapy API v2 (QA-Ready)
info.description:
Complete API for Therapy Booking Platform - Doctor Onboarding, Authentication, Appointments, and Admin Management

**Base URL:** {{baseUrl}}
**Version:** 2.0.0
**Updated:** 2026-05-19

formdata.value: 8+ years of clinical experience specializing in cognitive behavioral therapy

body.raw:
{
  "organization": "City Mental Health Clinic",
  "role": "Senior Clinical Psychologist",
  "workType": "clinic",
  "startDate": "2018-01-15",
  "endDate": null
}

item.name: [NEGATIVE] Create – missing endDate for past employment

body.raw:
{
  "accountHolderName": "Dr. Jane Smith",
  "accountNumber": "1234567890",
  "ifscCode": "HDFC0001234",
  "bankName": "HDFC Bank",
  "branchName": "New York Branch",
  "panNumber": "ABCDE1234F",
  "isGstRegistered": false,
  "gstNumber": null,
  "termsConsent": true
}

item.name: [NEGATIVE] Save Pricing – invalid session fee tier

exec: pm.test('Error mentions invalid tier', () => pm.expect(d.error || d.message || d.data).to.include('tier' || 'Invalid'));
pm.test('Error about justification', () => pm.expect(d.error || d.message || d.data).to.include('justification' || 'characters' || '10'));
pm.test('Error mentions terms or consent', () => pm.expect(d.error || d.message).to.include('terms' || 'consent'));

item.name: [NEGATIVE] Add Experience – missing endDate for past work

exec: pm.test('Error mentions custom work type', () => pm.expect(d.error || d.message).to.include('custom' || 'workType'));
